nasb.text: As he had come naked from his mother’s womb, so will he return as he came. He will take nothing from the fruit of his labor that he can carry in his hand.

esv.text: As he came from his mother’s womb he shall go again, naked as he came, and shall take nothing for his toil that he may carry away in his hand.

cnv.text: 他怎樣從母胎赤身而來，也必怎樣赤身而去；在勞碌中得來的，他的手也帶不走甚麼。

ccb.text: 人怎样从母腹空空而来，也必照样空空而去；劳碌一生，什么也不能带走。

csbs.text: 他从母腹中怎样赤身而来，也必怎样赤身而去，就像他来的那样；至于他的劳苦所得，他的手分毫不能带走——
